description: Legendary Chinese ruler, one of the Five Emperors, later worshipped as a god
description_wiki: The Yellow Emperor, also known as the Yellow Thearch or Huangdi (traditional Chinese: 黃帝; simplified Chinese: 黄帝), was a legendary Chinese sovereign and culture hero included among the legendary Three Sovereigns and Five Emperors.

description: founding and ruling party of the People's Republic of China
description_wiki: The Communist Party of China (CPC), commonly known as the Chinese Communist Party (CCP), is the founding and ruling party of the People's Republic of China (PRC).

description: public school, shanghai municipal demonstrative high school in Shanghai

description_wiki: Yao Ming (Chinese: 姚明; born September 12, 1980) is a Chinese basketball executive and former professional player.
Shanghai Jiao Tong University (SJTU) is a public university in Shanghai, China.
Fudan University (FDU) is a public university in Yangpu, Shanghai, China.
Yantai, formerly known by the Europeans as Chefoo, is a coastal prefecture-level city on the Shandong Peninsula in China.

Shandong is a coastal province in East China which has played a major role in the development of the Chinese civilization and culture as it has served as a pivotal cultural and religious center for Taoism, Chinese Buddhism and Confucianism.

aliases: Nationwide Unified Examination for Admissions to General Universities and Colleges
description: examination for the entrance of higher education in China
description_wiki: The Nationwide Unified Examination for Admissions to General Universities and Colleges (普通高等学校招生全国统一考试), commonly abbreviated as the Gaokao (高考; 'Higher Exam'; also interpreted as the National College Entrance Examination), is the annual nationally coordinated provincially-administered undergraduate admission exam in mainland China, held in early June.
Nanjing University (NJU) is a public university in Nanjing and Suzhou, Jiangsu, China.

entity: State University of New York at Buffalo
aliases: State University of New York at Buffalo
State University of New York, Buffalo
University at Buffalo, The State University of New York
description: university with campuses in and around Buffalo, NY and Amherst, NY
description_wiki: The State University of New York at Buffalo (commonly referred to as University at Buffalo, UB, or sometimes SUNY Buffalo) is a public research university in Buffalo and Amherst, New York, United States.

description: private university in Durham, North Carolina, USA
description_wiki: Duke University is a private research university in Durham, North Carolina, United States.
The Cultural Revolution, formally known as the Great Proletarian Cultural Revolution, was a sociopolitical movement in the People's Republic of China (PRC).
